signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 CPI inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 CPI inflation rose to 2.2% YoY (from 2.0% in Feb), below market consensus of 2.3-2.4%, driven by oil prices but curbed by government measures like fuel caps.** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2]

Core inflation (ex-food/energy) fell to 2.2% YoY from 2.3%, with monthly CPI up 0.3% vs expected 0.6%; food prices dropped to 0.5% YoY[1][2].  
Bank of Korea held rates at 2.5% last wee

signals.headline: Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active X-related market is "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?", with traders pricing a 97% chance on "December 31," reflecting over $121M in total X market volume and real-time sentiment shifts on the platform.[1]

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Bets Surge with High Volume | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Bets Surge with High Volume | NO | MED confidence**  
X users are buzzing about "Elon Musk # tweets April 10 - April 17, 2026?", where 88% odds favor 300-319 tweets amid $28.4M volume across 28 active Tweet Markets; a prior market for April 14-21 shows $13M volume on 300-319 at 88%.[4][3] No specific whale bets or smart money moves detailed in current data.
